inputs.label: Turbine Rated Capacity (MW)
inputs.businessContext: Nameplate capacity of the wind turbine model under evaluation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nameplate capacity of the wind turbine model under evaluation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değerlendirilen rüzgar türbini modelinin etiket kapasitesi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance nominale du modèle d'éolienne évalué.

inputs.label: Capacity Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual capacity factor based on site wind resource assessment (IEC 61400-1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual capacity factor based on site wind resource assessment (IEC 61400-1).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Saha rüzgar kaynağı değerlendirmesine (IEC 61400-1) dayalı beklenen yıllık kapasite faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter jährlicher Kapazitätsfaktor basierend auf der Standort-Windressourcenbewertung (IEC 61400-1).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de capacité annuel attendu basé sur l'évaluation de la ressource éolienne du site (IEC 61400-1).

inputs.label: Capital Cost per MW (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total installed cost per MW, including turbine, foundation, grid connection, and logistics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total installed cost per MW, including turbine, foundation, grid connection, and logistics.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Türbin, temel, şebeke bağlantısı ve lojistik dahil MW başına toplam kurulum maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtinstallationskosten pro MW, einschließlich Turbine, Fundament, Netzanschluss und Logistik.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total installé par MW, incluant l'éolienne, les fondations, le raccordement au réseau et la logistique.

inputs.label: Operating Expenditure (USD/MWh)
inputs.businessContext: Annual operations and maintenance cost per MWh generated (includes scheduled and unscheduled maintenance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual operations and maintenance cost per MWh generated (includes scheduled and unscheduled maintenance).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretilen MWh başına yıllık işletme ve bakım maliyeti (planlı ve plansız bakım dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Betriebs- und Wartungskosten pro erzeugter MWh (umfasst planmäßige und außerplanmäßige Wartung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût annuel d'exploitation et de maintenance par MWh produit (inclut maintenance programmée et non programmée).

inputs.label: Electricity Selling Price (USD/MWh)
inputs.businessContext: Power purchase agreement price or wholesale market price per MWh.

businessContext_i18n.en: Power purchase agreement price or wholesale market price per MWh.
businessContext_i18n.tr: MWh başına güç satın alma anlaşması fiyatı veya toptan satış piyasa fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix du contrat d'achat d'électricité ou prix du marché de gros par MWh.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) used for net present value calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) used for net present value calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Net bugünkü değer hesaplaması için kullanılan ağırlıklı ortalama sermaye maliyeti (WACC).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewichteter durchschnittlicher Kapitalkostensatz (WACC) für die Nettobarwertberechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen pondéré du capital (CMPC) utilisé pour le calcul de la valeur actualisée nette.

inputs.label: Project Lifetime (years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational life of the wind farm (typically 20-25 years).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational life of the wind farm (typically 20-25 years).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rüzgar çiftliğinin beklenen işletme ömrü (tipik olarak 20-25 yıl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de vie opérationnelle prévue du parc éolien (généralement 20-25 ans).

inputs.label: Annual Degradation Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual reduction in energy production due to blade wear, gearbox aging, and other factors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual reduction in energy production due to blade wear, gearbox aging, and other factors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kanat aşınması, dişli kutusu yaşlanması ve diğer faktörler nedeniyle enerji üretiminde beklenen yıllık azalma.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Verringerung der Energieproduktion aufgrund von Blattverschleiß, Getriebealterung und anderen Faktoren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réduction annuelle attendue de la production d'énergie due à l'usure des pales, au vieillissement du multiplicateur et à d'autres facteurs.

rules.message: Capacity factor outside typical range for most sites; verify wind resource data.
Capital cost for floating offshore is unusually low; check input.
High degradation rate contradicts predictive maintenance strategy; review assumptions.

thresholds.alert: Negative net present value; project may not be financially viable.
Internal rate of return below discount rate; value destruction likely.
Operating cost exceeds 25% of revenue; investigate cost reduction opportunities.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
